title: Reflect Totals in Board from data in another board without mirror column

posts.author: accountingonmonday (US Checks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We have Stripe payments coming into our “Payments” board. We would like our “Application” board to reflect the total payments for each application as a number column. As this total column would need to be exported into a separate program for invoicing, we cannot use a mirror column.

Any suggestions?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @accountingonmonday

The Rollup Multiple Boards app can do that (see https://monday.com/marketplace/101). Although designed for multiple (unlimited) down-level board it will also work with just one detail board (holding your Stripe Payments). The summarized data in your Application board is written to a normal number column that can be used in exports, reports etc.
